title: Assistant Store Manager - Khadim's - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Khadim's - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
